{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Relations Officer",
  "description": "Swift Dry Cleaners Limited is a reputable and thriving establishment dedicated to providing top-notch laundry and dry cleaning services. We pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence, customer satisfaction, and a positive working environment for our team.&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Relations Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Are you passionate about customer service and looking to make an impact in a fast-growing laundry and dry cleaning company?
	Swift Drycleaners Ltd is seeking a dedicated Customer Relations Officer to enhance customer experience and contribute to the growth of our customer base.
	If you reside around the Ogba axis and have a flair for both customer service and marketing, we&rsquo;d love to hear from you!


Key Responsibilities


	Attend to customer inquiries and resolve complaints in a professional and timely manner.
	Manage customer orders, ensuring accurate and prompt pickup and delivery of garments.
	Handle phone calls, emails, and walk-in clients with excellent service etiquette.
	Maintain and update the customer database, ensuring accuracy of customer information and preferences.
	Develop and implement strategies to increase the company&#39;s customer base, including customer referral programs and targeted marketing initiatives.
	Promote the company&rsquo;s services and products to both existing and potential customers to increase brand awareness.
	Coordinate with the operations/factory to ensure seamless service delivery.
	Collect, document, and analyze customer feedback to improve service offerings.
	Participate in community engagement and local marketing efforts to attract new customers within the Ogba area.


Qualifications and Skills


	Minimum of OND/HND/Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	Proven experience in customer service, preferably in a laundry or retail environment.
	Strong marketing and communication skills, with the ability to promote services effectively.
	Ability to develop creative strategies to drive customer acquisition and retention.
	Excellent interpersonal and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite.
	Must reside around Ogba or its environs.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / Month

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@pallyagro.ng&nbsp;using &quot;Application for Customer Relations Officer &ndash; Ogba&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-05",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Swift Dry Cleaners Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "197691"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

      "minValue": 75000,

}



Customer Relations Officer Job at Swift Dry Cleaners Limited




        
    

        
        Swift Dry Cleaners Limited is a reputable and thriving establishment dedicated to providing top-notch laundry and dry cleaning services. We pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence, customer satisfaction, and a positive working environment for our team. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Relations Officer

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you passionate about customer service and looking to make an impact in a fast-growing laundry and dry cleaning company?
	Swift Drycleaners Ltd is seeking a dedicated Customer Relations Officer to enhance customer experience and contribute to the growth of our customer base.
	If you reside around the Ogba axis and have a flair for both customer service and marketing, we’d love to hear from you!


Key Responsibilities


	Attend to customer inquiries and resolve complaints in a professional and timely manner.
	Manage customer orders, ensuring accurate and prompt pickup and delivery of garments.
	Handle phone calls, emails, and walk-in clients with excellent service etiquette.
	Maintain and update the customer database, ensuring accuracy of customer information and preferences.
	Develop and implement strategies to increase the company's customer base, including customer referral programs and targeted marketing initiatives.
	Promote the company’s services and products to both existing and potential customers to increase brand awareness.
	Coordinate with the operations/factory to ensure seamless service delivery.
	Collect, document, and analyze customer feedback to improve service offerings.
	Participate in community engagement and local marketing efforts to attract new customers within the Ogba area.


Qualifications and Skills


	Minimum of OND/HND/Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	Proven experience in customer service, preferably in a laundry or retail environment.
	Strong marketing and communication skills, with the ability to promote services effectively.
	Ability to develop creative strategies to drive customer acquisition and retention.
	Excellent interpersonal and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite.
	Must reside around Ogba or its environs.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / Month

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application for Customer Relations Officer – Ogba" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Telesales Marketing Executive - Cutting & Edging Services",
  "description": "Marsand Bespoke Joinery -&nbsp;We are a growing furniture services company specialising in professional cutting and edging solutions. We specialize in creating high-quality, custom-made joinery solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client. With a commitment to craftsmanship and attention to detail, they offer a wide range of services, including bespoke cabinetry, furniture, and architectural joinery. Their team of skilled artisans combines traditional woodworking techniques with modern technology to deliver exceptional products that enhance both functionality and aesthetics in residential and commercial spaces.

Marsand prides itself on its personalized service, working closely with clients to understand their vision and bring it to life. Whether it&rsquo;s a stunning kitchen renovation, a unique piece of furniture, or intricate woodwork for a commercial project, they ensure that every piece reflects the client&#39;s style and requirements. Their dedication to sustainability and using responsibly sourced materials further sets them apart in the joinery industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Telesales Marketing Executive - Cutting &amp; Edging Services

Job Location:&nbsp;Awoyaya, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are looking for a proactive and confident Marketing Executive to help promote our services and grow our client base within Lagos.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for marketing our cutting and edging services, engaging with potential clients, and building strong customer relationships. This role requires someone who is confident on the phone and can communicate clearly and professionally.


Key Responsibilities


	Promote and market our cutting and edging services to potential clients.
	Handle customer enquiries via phone, WhatsApp, and in person.
	Build and maintain strong client relationships.
	Follow up on leads and convert enquiries into business.
	Provide clear and accurate information about services and pricing.


Requirements


	Must reside in Lagos, preferably within or around the Ajah axis.
	Excellent telephone manners and communication skills.
	Previous marketing or sales experience is an advantage.
	Confident, proactive, and target-driven.
	Good interpersonal and customer service skills.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;marsandinternationalco@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Telesales Marketing Executive - Cutting & Edging Services Job at Marsand Bespoke Joinery




        
    

        
        Marsand Bespoke Joinery - We are a growing furniture services company specialising in professional cutting and edging solutions. We specialize in creating high-quality, custom-made joinery solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client. With a commitment to craftsmanship and attention to detail, they offer a wide range of services, including bespoke cabinetry, furniture, and architectural joinery. Their team of skilled artisans combines traditional woodworking techniques with modern technology to deliver exceptional products that enhance both functionality and aesthetics in residential and commercial spaces.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Marsand prides itself on its personalized service, working closely with clients to understand their vision and bring it to life. Whether it’s a stunning kitchen renovation, a unique piece of furniture, or intricate woodwork for a commercial project, they ensure that every piece reflects the client's style and requirements. Their dedication to sustainability and using responsibly sourced materials further sets them apart in the joinery industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Telesales Marketing Executive - Cutting & Edging Services

Job Location: Awoyaya, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are looking for a proactive and confident Marketing Executive to help promote our services and grow our client base within Lagos.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for marketing our cutting and edging services, engaging with potential clients, and building strong customer relationships. This role requires someone who is confident on the phone and can communicate clearly and professionally.


Key Responsibilities


	Promote and market our cutting and edging services to potential clients.
	Handle customer enquiries via phone, WhatsApp, and in person.
	Build and maintain strong client relationships.
	Follow up on leads and convert enquiries into business.
	Provide clear and accurate information about services and pricing.


Requirements


	Must reside in Lagos, preferably within or around the Ajah axis.
	Excellent telephone manners and communication skills.
	Previous marketing or sales experience is an advantage.
	Confident, proactive, and target-driven.
	Good interpersonal and customer service skills.


Salary
N100,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Description


	We are looking to recruit Area Sales Officer (ASO) Pre-Order Model. The successful candidates will be responsible for collecting orders from supermarkets and ensuring effective in-store execution.


Job Description


	In-Store Execution: Ensure 100% product availability and optimal visibility at all times.
	Account Management: Build and maintain strong relationships with store managers and buying teams across major supermarkets.
	Stock &amp; Inventory Management: Monitor stock levels to prevent out-of-stock situations and coordinate with distributors and dispatch teams for timely replenishment.
	Coverage: Visit assigned supermarkets daily, record stock levels, and generate orders for at least 15 supermarkets in line with the assigned route plan.
	Debt Collection: Follow up on outstanding payments and ensure timely debt recovery where applicable.
	SFA Usage: Ensure all generated orders are accurately captured in the SFA system at the point of sale (POS).
	DMS Compliance: Ensure all orders are transmitted to the distributor&rsquo;s DMS and processed for dispatch accordingly.
	Market Intelligence: Monitor competitor activities, pricing, and gather consumer feedback to support business decisions.


Requirements

	Minimum of a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND).
	1&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in FMCG, specifically within the supermarket channel.


Job Locations:


	Ajah/Lekki
	Agege/Alimosho
	Surulere/Victoria Island


Required Skills:


	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Proven ability to build and sustain relationships with key stakeholders across different levels.
	Proficiency in using SFA and DMS systems.


Salary

Area Sales Officer (ASO), Pre-Order Model Job at Total Data Limited




        
    

        
        Total Data Limited is a management consultancy firm specializing in the provision of Human Resources and Manpower solutions to its’ clients across Nigeria. We focus on providing additional and exceptional services through value added, and end-to-end HR services to our clients; helping them maximize and build operational efficiency.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Area Sales Officer (ASO), Pre-Order Model

Job Locations: Ajah/Lekki, Agege/Alimosho, and Surulere/Victoria Island - Lagos
Job type: Full time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking to recruit Area Sales Officer (ASO) Pre-Order Model. The successful candidates will be responsible for collecting orders from supermarkets and ensuring effective in-store execution.


Job Description


	In-Store Execution: Ensure 100% product availability and optimal visibility at all times.
	Account Management: Build and maintain strong relationships with store managers and buying teams across major supermarkets.
	Stock & Inventory Management: Monitor stock levels to prevent out-of-stock situations and coordinate with distributors and dispatch teams for timely replenishment.
	Coverage: Visit assigned supermarkets daily, record stock levels, and generate orders for at least 15 supermarkets in line with the assigned route plan.
	Debt Collection: Follow up on outstanding payments and ensure timely debt recovery where applicable.
	SFA Usage: Ensure all generated orders are accurately captured in the SFA system at the point of sale (POS).
	DMS Compliance: Ensure all orders are transmitted to the distributor’s DMS and processed for dispatch accordingly.
	Market Intelligence: Monitor competitor activities, pricing, and gather consumer feedback to support business decisions.


Requirements
Qualifications:


	Minimum of a Bachelor’s Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND).
	1–5 years of relevant experience in FMCG, specifically within the supermarket channel.


Job Locations:


	Ajah/Lekki
	Agege/Alimosho
	Surulere/Victoria Island


Required Skills:


	Strong verbal and written communication skills.
	Proven ability to build and sustain relationships with key stakeholders across different levels.
	Proficiency in using SFA and DMS systems.


Salary
N114,000.00 gross monthly salary plus float allowance (where applicable)

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Lead Credit Modeller / Data Scientist",
  "description": "The Concept Group is a holding company for companies established in 1992. Subsidiaries under the Group include: Rosabon Financial Services - Nigeria&rsquo;s Leading Financial Intermediary and Equipment Leasing Company, Concept Nova - Bespoke Enterprise IT Solutions Company,Percy Aitkins - Bureau De Change.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Lead Credit Modeller / Data Scientist
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Credit Risk / Data Science
Reports To: Head of Data Science

Role Summary


	We are looking for a senior Credit Modeller &amp; Data Scientist to lead the development, validation, and improvement of credit risk models and data-driven decision systems.
	This role will support smarter underwriting, stronger portfolio monitoring, and better lending decisions through analytics, machine learning, and automation.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and manage credit scoring models, including application, behavioural, and collections scorecards
	Build PD, LGD, and EAD models in line with IFRS 9 and regulatory standards
	Use machine learning and advanced analytics to improve lending decisions, fraud detection, and portfolio performance
	Monitor, validate, and recalibrate models using standard performance metrics
	Work with data, product, engineering, and credit teams to improve automated decision systems
	Analyze portfolio trends and provide insights for credit policy and risk strategy
	Lead and mentor a team of analysts and data scientists
	Present insights and recommendations to senior management and key stakeholders


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s or Master&rsquo;s degree in a relevant field
	5&ndash;10+ years of experience in credit risk modelling or data science within banking, fintech, or microfinance
	Strong knowledge of statistical modelling, machine learning, and credit risk frameworks
	Proficiency in Python, R, SQL, SAS, or similar tools
	Experience with BI tools and model deployment platforms is an advantage
	This role is for someone who can combine strong technical modelling skills with business thinking and leadership. Please send your applications to:jayne.badmus@conceptgroup-ng.com


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to:&nbsp;jayne.badmus@conceptgroup-ng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Lead Credit Modeller / Data Scientist Job at the Concept Group is




        
    

        
        The Concept Group is a holding company for companies established in 1992. Subsidiaries under the Group include: Rosabon Financial Services - Nigeria’s Leading Financial Intermediary and Equipment Leasing Company, Concept Nova - Bespoke Enterprise IT Solutions Company,Percy Aitkins - Bureau De Change.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Lead Credit Modeller / Data Scientist
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Credit Risk / Data Science
Reports To: Head of Data Science

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a senior Credit Modeller & Data Scientist to lead the development, validation, and improvement of credit risk models and data-driven decision systems.
	This role will support smarter underwriting, stronger portfolio monitoring, and better lending decisions through analytics, machine learning, and automation.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and manage credit scoring models, including application, behavioural, and collections scorecards
	Build PD, LGD, and EAD models in line with IFRS 9 and regulatory standards
	Use machine learning and advanced analytics to improve lending decisions, fraud detection, and portfolio performance
	Monitor, validate, and recalibrate models using standard performance metrics
	Work with data, product, engineering, and credit teams to improve automated decision systems
	Analyze portfolio trends and provide insights for credit policy and risk strategy
	Lead and mentor a team of analysts and data scientists
	Present insights and recommendations to senior management and key stakeholders


Requirements


	Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a relevant field
	5–10+ years of experience in credit risk modelling or data science within banking, fintech, or microfinance
	Strong knowledge of statistical modelling, machine learning, and credit risk frameworks
	Proficiency in Python, R, SQL, SAS, or similar tools
	Experience with BI tools and model deployment platforms is an advantage
	This role is for someone who can combine strong technical modelling skills with business thinking and leadership. Please send your applications to:[email protected]


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer / Quantity Surveyor",
  "description": "Java Design Concept Limited is a company that has more than 20 year&rsquo;s experience in the construction industry &amp; are dedicated to deliver in various services in the construction sectors, from Residential, Commercial buildings, high-rise buildings, road construction to Oil &amp; Gas Infrastructures as well as steel fabrication &amp; Concrete solutions. Our ability to handle any type of construction projects gives us the strength and permits our client to push boundaries with a peace of mind. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer / Quantity Surveyor&nbsp;
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Procurement Officer to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will play a key role in sourcing, negotiating, and managing the procurement of materials, services, and contracts in line with project specifications and budgetary requirements.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, coordinate, and manage procurement activities for construction and design projects.
	Source suppliers, contractors, and vendors while ensuring compliance with company standards.
	Evaluate quotations, prepare comparative analyses, and recommend cost-effective options
	Negotiate contracts, pricing, and terms with suppliers and service providers
	Maintain accurate procurement records, purchase orders, and supplier databases
	Ensure timely delivery of materials and services to project sites
	Monitor supplier performance and ensure adherence to agreed terms
	Work closely with project managers, finance, and site engineers to align procurement with project needs


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Quantity Surveying (mandatory).
	2&ndash;5 years of relevant experience in procurement, construction, or project management.
	Professional certification or membership (e.g., NIQS) is an added advantage.
	Strong knowledge of cost estimation, contract management, and procurement processes.
	Excellent negotiation, analytical, and communication skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and procurement documentation tools.
	High level of integrity, accountability, and attention to details.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr.javadesignconcept@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Procurement Officer to join our team.

	Plan, coordinate, and manage procurement activities for construction and design projects.
